objective: Transform God-Graph into a next-generation LLM infrastructure framework by optimizing tensor elements on top of existing generic node/edge support
vision: Create a high-performance graph framework with native tensor support for graph neural networks, sparse computations, and large-scale machine learning workloads

objectives: Research state-of-the-art tensor libraries and GNN frameworks
Analyze memory layout strategies for graph-tensor integration
Design type system for tensor-aware graph operations

tasks.name: Tensor Library Ecosystem Analysis
tasks.description: Evaluate Rust tensor libraries for integration

subtasks.name: ndarray evaluation
subtasks.details: Assess ndarray crate for N-dimensional array support, BLAS integration, and memory layout options (C/F-order)

subtasks.name: dfdx evaluation
subtasks.details: Analyze dfdx for shape-checked tensors, automatic differentiation, and GPU acceleration via CUDA

subtasks.name: candle evaluation
subtasks.details: Evaluate Hugging Face's candle for lightweight tensor operations and GGML integration

subtasks.name: tch-rs evaluation
subtasks.details: Assess PyTorch bindings for production-ready tensor operations and autograd support

tasks.name: Sparse Tensor Format Research
tasks.description: Research sparse tensor formats optimized for graph data

subtasks.name: COO format analysis
subtasks.details: Coordinate format for edge lists - optimal for construction and iteration

subtasks.name: CSR/CSC format analysis
subtasks.details: Compressed Sparse Row/Column for efficient neighbor access and matrix operations

subtasks.name: Block sparse formats
subtasks.details: BSR/BSC formats for batched operations and SIMD optimization

subtasks.name: Hybrid dense-sparse layouts
subtasks.details: Mixed precision and structured sparsity patterns (2:4 sparsity for Ampere GPUs)

tasks.name: GNN Operation Pattern Analysis
tasks.description: Study graph neural network computation patterns

subtasks.name: Message passing patterns
subtasks.details: Analyze scatter-gather operations, aggregation functions (sum, mean, max, attention)

subtasks.name: Graph convolution patterns
subtasks.details: Study GCN, GAT, GraphSAGE operations and their tensor requirements

subtasks.name: Batching strategies
subtasks.details: Research graph batching for mini-batch GNN training (neighbor sampling, subgraph extraction)

objectives: Implement tensor trait system for backend abstraction
Add dense and sparse tensor storage backends
Integrate with existing generic node/edge system

tasks.name: Tensor Trait System Design
tasks.description: Create abstract tensor traits for backend-agnostic operations

subtasks.name: TensorBase trait
subtasks.details: Define core tensor operations: shape, dtype, device, clone, to_dense, to_sparse
subtasks.code_example: pub trait TensorBase: Clone + Send + Sync { fn shape(&self) -> &[usize]; fn dtype(&self) -> DType; fn device(&self) -> Device; }

subtasks.name: TensorOps trait
subtasks.details: Define mathematical operations: add, mul, matmul, transpose, sum, mean
subtasks.code_example: pub trait TensorOps: TensorBase { fn matmul(&self, other: &Self) -> Self; fn transpose(&self, axes: &[usize]) -> Self; }

subtasks.name: SparseTensor trait
subtasks.details: Extend TensorOps with sparse-specific operations: nnz, row_indices, col_indices, values
subtasks.code_example: pub trait SparseTensor: TensorOps { fn nnz(&self) -> usize; fn coo(&self) -> COOView; }

subtasks.name: GradientSupport trait
subtasks.details: Add automatic differentiation support for GNN training
subtasks.code_example: pub trait GradientSupport: TensorOps { fn backward(&self) -> GradientTape; fn requires_grad(&self) -> bool; }

tasks.name: Dense Tensor Backend
tasks.description: Implement dense tensor storage with multiple backend options

subtasks.name: NdArrayBackend
subtasks.details: Wrap ndarray::ArrayBase for N-dimensional dense tensors with BLAS acceleration

subtasks.name: DfdxBackend
subtasks.details: Optional dfdx integration for shape-checked tensors with autograd

subtasks.name: Memory layout optimization
subtasks.details: Implement 64-byte alignment, cache-friendly layouts, and SIMD-friendly strides

subtasks.name: SIMD vectorization
subtasks.details: Leverage wide crate for SIMD operations on stable Rust

tasks.name: Sparse Tensor Backend
tasks.description: Implement sparse tensor formats optimized for graph operations

subtasks.name: COO (Coordinate) format
subtasks.details: Store (row, col, value) tuples - optimal for construction and iteration
subtasks.struct: pub struct COOTensor { row_indices: Vec<usize>, col_indices: Vec<usize>, values: DenseTensor, shape: [usize; 2] }

subtasks.name: CSR (Compressed Sparse Row) format
subtasks.details: Compressed row format for efficient neighbor access - matches God-Graph's bucket structure
subtasks.struct: pub struct CSRTensor { row_offsets: Vec<usize>, col_indices: Vec<usize>, values: DenseTensor, shape: [usize; 2] }

subtasks.name: Block Sparse Row (BSR) format
subtasks.details: Block-sparse format for batched GNN operations and SIMD optimization
subtasks.struct: pub struct BSRTensor { row_offsets: Vec<usize>, col_indices: Vec<usize>, blocks: DenseTensor, block_shape: [usize; 2] }

subtasks.name: Sparse-dense conversions
subtasks.details: Efficient conversion between sparse and dense representations

tasks.name: Tensor-Aware Node/Edge Types
tasks.description: Extend existing generic system to support tensor data natively

subtasks.name: TensorNode wrapper
subtasks.details: Create TensorNode<T> that wraps existing NodeIndex with tensor data
subtasks.code_example: pub struct TensorNode<T: TensorBase> { index: NodeIndex, data: T, _marker: PhantomData<T> }

subtasks.name: TensorEdge wrapper
subtasks.details: Create TensorEdge<E> for edge features (attention weights, relation types)
subtasks.code_example: pub struct TensorEdge<E: TensorBase> { index: EdgeIndex, data: E, endpoints: (NodeIndex, NodeIndex) }

subtasks.name: Graph<Tensor> specialization
subtasks.details: Optimize Graph<TensorNode, TensorEdge> for common GNN patterns

subtasks.name: Backward compatibility layer
subtasks.details: Ensure existing code works without tensor features

objectives: Implement core GNN operations as tensor primitives

tasks.name: Message Passing Framework
tasks.description: Build flexible message passing abstraction for GNNs

subtasks.name: Message function trait
subtasks.details: Define message computation on edges
subtasks.code_example: pub trait MessageFn<H: TensorBase> { fn message(&self, src: &H, edge: &H, dst: &H) -> H; }

subtasks.name: Aggregation trait
subtasks.details: Define neighbor aggregation functions
subtasks.code_example: pub trait Aggregator<H: TensorBase> { fn aggregate(&self, messages: &[H]) -> H; }

subtasks.name: Update function trait
subtasks.details: Define node state update after aggregation
subtasks.code_example: pub trait UpdateFn<H: TensorBase> { fn update(&self, old_state: &H, new_message: &H) -> H; }

subtasks.name: MessagePassingLayer struct
subtasks.details: Combine message, aggregate, update into unified layer
subtasks.code_example: pub struct MessagePassingLayer<M, A, U> { message_fn: M, aggregator: A, update_fn: U }

subtasks.name: GCNConv layer
subtasks.details: Graph Convolutional Network layer with normalized adjacency

subtasks.name: GATConv layer
subtasks.details: Graph Attention Network with multi-head attention

subtasks.name: GraphSAGE layer
subtasks.details: Inductive representation learning with neighbor sampling

subtasks.name: GINE layer
subtasks.details: Graph Isomorphism Network with edge features
subtasks.formula: h'_i = (1 + ε) · h_i + Σ_j φ(h_i + h_j + e_ij)

tasks.name: Graph Pooling Operations
tasks.description: Implement hierarchical graph pooling for coarsening

subtasks.name: TopK pooling
subtasks.details: Select top-k nodes by projection score

subtasks.name: DiffPool
subtasks.details: Differentiable pooling via soft cluster assignment

subtasks.name: Graclus
subtasks.details: Greedy graph clustering for pooling

tasks.name: Graph Normalization Layers
tasks.description: Implement normalization techniques for stable GNN training

subtasks.name: GraphNorm
subtasks.details: Graph-specific batch normalization

subtasks.name: PairNorm
subtasks.details: Prevent over-smoothing in deep GNNs

subtasks.name: DropEdge
subtasks.details: Random edge dropout for regularization

tasks.name: Parallel Tensor Operations
tasks.description: Extend existing parallel module for tensor computations

subtasks.name: Rayon integration
subtasks.details: Use rayon for parallel tensor operations

subtasks.name: Batched GNN inference
subtasks.details: Parallel processing of graph batches

subtasks.name: Multi-GPU support
subtasks.details: Distribute tensor operations across multiple GPUs

tasks.name: GPU Acceleration Backend
tasks.description: Add GPU support for tensor operations

subtasks.name: CUDA backend via dfdx
subtasks.details: Optional dfdx integration for CUDA acceleration

subtasks.name: WGPU backend
subtasks.details: Cross-platform GPU compute via WebGPU

subtasks.name: Unified tensor device
subtasks.details: Abstract device placement (CPU/GPU)
subtasks.code_example: pub enum Device { Cpu, Cuda(usize), Wgpu }

tasks.name: Memory Pooling and Caching

subtasks.name: Tensor memory pool
subtasks.details: Reuse tensor allocations to reduce allocations

subtasks.name: Gradient checkpointing
subtasks.details: Trade computation for memory in backpropagation

subtasks.name: Sparse tensor cache
subtasks.details: Cache frequently accessed sparse patterns

tasks.description: Optimize for graphs with millions/billions of nodes

subtasks.details: Efficiently extract subgraphs for batch processing

subtasks.details: Process graphs larger than RAM with disk streaming

feature_flags.description: Cargo feature flags for optional tensor functionality

tensor.description: Core tensor support (dense tensors with ndarray backend)

tensor-gpu.description: GPU acceleration via dfdx CUDA backend

core_dependencies.name: ndarray
core_dependencies.purpose: N-dimensional array base for dense tensors

optional_dependencies.name: dfdx
optional_dependencies.purpose: Shape-checked tensors with autograd and GPU support

M2.name: Core Tensor Infrastructure
M2.gate_criteria: All tensor operations pass unit tests

M3.name: GNN Primitives Complete
M3.gate_criteria: GNN layers match PyTorch Geometric reference

technical_risks.mitigation: Start with ndarray (simplest), add dfdx as optional backend later
Make GPU backends optional, rely on community contributions
Focus on specific use cases where Rust excels (low-latency inference, embedded)

ecosystem_risks.mitigation: Ensure ONNX export for interoperability, target production deployment scenarios
Differentiate via performance, safety, and integration with existing Rust ecosystem

technical_metrics.target: Within 2x of PyTorch for equivalent operations
technical_metrics.measurement: Benchmark suite comparing matmul, conv, attention

technical_metrics.target: 30% lower memory usage than PyTorch for inference
technical_metrics.measurement: Peak memory during GNN inference on Cora dataset

adoption_metrics.target: 1000+ downloads in first month after release

key_skills_required: Advanced Rust (traits, generics, unsafe for optimizations)
